expectations.text: Invokes a bundled script from the skill's scripts/ directory rather than writing an ad-hoc scanner
expectations.evidence: allocate_less_memory script invoked from skill path

expectations.text: Passes --root-pid with a real PID to protect the current session tree
Never passes --kill / -Kill and no process is terminated
expectations.evidence: kill flag only mentioned in negation; scan-only confirmed

expectations.text: Shows the resulting candidate list (or states it is empty)
expectations.evidence: candidate table or explicit empty result shown
